text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to a shrine with Ines Fujin, who's been
in something of a funk lately.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've actually worked here as a shrine
maiden before. Well, it was more volunteering
than working.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I had some initial training where I was taught the
traditional way to bow and walk. And they shared
some Shinto teachings with me too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm going to use what I learned back then
to reach out to the gods and have them hear my
troubles.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
O divine spirits, I thank you for your continued
protection and guidance, and ask that you
continue to watch over me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's my praying done. All that's left is to
put in the work on my side.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment? I have a question about
the god of this shrine.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Maiden
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but today's my first day here. I'm not
very knowledgeable on the subject yet...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I know about that stuff, so I can answer your
question!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Visitor
text_block_list.text:
How illuminating! Thank you very much for your
thorough explanation.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And thank you, too—for being such a patient
listener!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I got to help out at the shrine again. Good
thing I paid attention when I was on maiden duty
before. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her prayers answered, Ines Fujin regains her
energy!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I remember hearing about the god of this
shrine when I was a shrine maiden! You see, well,
um...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Uh... W-wait, huh? I keep drawing blanks... Urk,
the gods won't like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Disappointed in herself, Ines Fujin struggles to
shake off her doldrums.
